modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty titling sections and pages in OneNote

full_description_text: 
So, I was on the phone with a user who was trying to figure out how to title their sections and pages in OneNote. They seemed a bit confused and mentioned that they wanted to keep everything organized but just couldn't find the right way to do it. It was a bit of a struggle for them, and they really wanted to make sure their notes looked good.
